name: Campaigns
description: Social media campaign manager — draft, schedule, and publish posts across platforms (starting with Reddit)
author: Crow

env_vars.name: CROW_CAMPAIGNS_ENCRYPTION_KEY
env_vars.description: AES-256-GCM encryption key for Reddit credentials (generate with: openssl rand -base64 32)

notes: 12 MCP tools for social media campaign management. Reddit support via snoowrap. Credentials encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM. Dashboard panel with approval workflow.
